message:
feat(store,runtime,command): implement keyspace notifications and DEBUG SLEEP

Keyspace Notifications (Redis notify-keyspace-events):
- Add notification flag constants (NOTIFY_KEYSPACE, NOTIFY_KEYEVENT,
  NOTIFY_STRING, NOTIFY_LIST, NOTIFY_SET, NOTIFY_HASH, NOTIFY_ZSET,
  NOTIFY_EXPIRED, NOTIFY_EVICTED, NOTIFY_STREAM, NOTIFY_ALL, etc.)
- Add keyspace_events_parse() and keyspace_events_to_string() for
  config string ↔ flags conversion
- Add Store::notify_keyspace_event() to queue notifications
- Add Runtime::command_to_keyspace_event() mapping commands to event names
- Add Runtime::command_to_notify_type() mapping commands to type flags
- Wire notification delivery into post-dispatch hook (after dirty check)
- Deliver notifications via existing pub/sub infrastructure to
  __keyspace@<db>__:<key> and __keyevent@<db>__:<event> channels
- CONFIG SET notify-keyspace-events parses and activates notifications

DEBUG SLEEP:
- Now actually blocks the event loop using std::thread::sleep()
- Accepts fractional seconds (e.g., DEBUG SLEEP 0.5)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
